              • Avalonia 11 To 12
              • Wpf To Avalonia Key Mappings

Avalonia UI 12 — Study & Reference Documentation

Target: Avalonia 12.0.4 · .NET 10 · CommunityToolkit.Mvvm 8.x
Last indexed: 2026-06-18
View rendered: Open viewer.html via a local HTTP server (see below)

An organized collection of mini-tutorials, reference guides, patterns, and migration notes for Avalonia UI development. Written for developers who know the basics but need quick refreshers, structured learning, and deep-dive references.

Quick Start

If you want to... Start here
Set up a new Avalonia 12 project 001-project-setup
Wire a button to a command 002-command-binding
Style a button with themes 003-basic-styling
Display a list of items 009-data-templates-basics
Create a reusable custom control advanced/ ...

01 — Quick References

Cheat sheets and one-page summaries for common tasks.

Ref Topic
Q01 Avalonia 11 → 12 key breaking changes
Q02 CommunityToolkit.Mvvm source generator reference
Q03 XAML style selectors cheat sheet
Q04 Binding modes cheat sheet
Q05 Resource Dictionaries
Q06 Control Themes reference
Q07 Common Controls reference (15 controls)
Q08 Naming Conventions — files, classes, x:Name, resources
Q09 Common Converters — BoolToVis, StringNotEmpty, EnumToBool, MultiValue
Q10 Accessibility & Automation IDs — AutomationProperties, focus order
Q11 Input Gestures — syntax, modifiers, mouse, scroll, common shortcuts
Q12 Shapes & Geometries — Shape controls, Geometry types, path mini-language
Q13 Icons Reference — image files, icon fonts, path icons, menu icons
Routed Events Routed events quick ref — strategies, registration, common events, handlers
Property System Property system quick ref — Styled/Direct/Attached, registration, precedence
Dispatcher & Timers Dispatcher & timers quick ref — priorities, DispatcherTimer, sync context
Brushes & Colors Brushes & colors reference — all brush types, gradients, acrylic, named colors
Font & Typography Font & typography reference — families, weights, FormattedText, custom fonts

02 — Mini-Tutorials

Step-by-step guides organized by difficulty.

Basics

  1. 001 — Project Setup ⌞ 001V — Project Setup (verbose companion) ⌞ 001X — Project Setup (examples) ⌞ 001Q — Project Setup (quiz)
  2. 002 — Command Binding ⌞ 002V — Command Binding (verbose companion) ⌞ 002X — Command Binding (examples) ⌞ 002Q — Command Binding (quiz)
  3. 003 — Basic Styling ⌞ 003V — Basic Styling (verbose companion) ⌞ 003X — Basic Styling (examples) ⌞ 003Q — Basic Styling (quiz)
  4. 004 — Value Converters ⌞ 004V — Value Converters (verbose companion) ⌞ 004X — Value Converters (examples) ⌞ 004Q — Value Converters (quiz)
  5. 005 — Binding Modes ⌞ 005V — Binding Modes (verbose companion) ⌞ 005X — Binding Modes (examples) ⌞ 005Q — Binding Modes (quiz)
  6. 006 — Resources (Static & Dynamic) ⌞ 006V — Resources (verbose companion) ⌞ 006X — Resources (examples) ⌞ 006Q — Resources (quiz)
  7. 007 — ObservableObject & ObservableProperty ⌞ 007V — ObservableObject & ObservableProperty (verbose companion) ⌞ 007X — ObservableObject & ObservableProperty (examples) ⌞ 007Q — ObservableObject & ObservableProperty (quiz)
  8. 008 — RelayCommand (sync & async) ⌞ 008V — RelayCommand (verbose companion) ⌞ 008X — RelayCommand (examples) ⌞ 008Q — RelayCommand (quiz)
  9. 009 — Data Templates Basics ⌞ 009V — Data Templates (verbose companion) ⌞ 009X — Data Templates (real-world examples) ⌞ 009Q — Data Templates (quiz)
  10. 010 — Window Basics & Simple Dialogs ⌞ 010V — Window & Dialogs Basics (verbose companion) ⌞ 010X — Window & Dialogs (examples) ⌞ 010Q — Window & Dialogs Basics (quiz)

  31. 082 — Graphics & Drawing Reference ⌞ 082V — Graphics & Drawing Reference (verbose companion) ⌞ 082X — Graphics & Drawing Reference (examples) ⌞ 082Q — Graphics & Drawing Reference (quiz)
  32. 083 — Container Queries & Responsive Layout ⌞ 083V — Container Queries & Responsive Layout (verbose companion) ⌞ 083X — Container Queries & Responsive Layout (examples) ⌞ 083Q — Container Queries & Responsive Layout (quiz)
  33. 084 — Typography & Text Features ⌞ 084V — Typography & Text Features (verbose companion) ⌞ 084X — Typography & Text Features (examples) ⌞ 084Q — Typography & Text Features (quiz)
  34. 085 — Performance & Profiling ⌞ 085V — Performance & Profiling (verbose companion) ⌞ 085X — Performance & Profiling (examples) ⌞ 085Q — Performance & Profiling (quiz)
  35. 086 — Platform-Specific: Windows ⌞ 086V — Platform-Specific: Windows (verbose companion) ⌞ 086X — Platform-Specific: Windows (examples) ⌞ 086Q — Platform-Specific: Windows (quiz)
  36. 087 — Platform-Specific: macOS & Linux ⌞ 087V — Platform-Specific: macOS & Linux (verbose companion) ⌞ 087X — Platform-Specific: macOS & Linux (examples) ⌞ 087Q — Platform-Specific: macOS & Linux (quiz)
  37. 088 — XAML Previewer & Hot Reload ⌞ 088V — XAML Previewer & Hot Reload (verbose companion) ⌞ 088X — XAML Previewer & Hot Reload (examples) ⌞ 088Q — XAML Previewer & Hot Reload (quiz)
  38. 089 — Custom Flyout & Popup ⌞ 089V — Custom Flyout & Popup (verbose companion) ⌞ 089X — Custom Flyout & Popup (examples) ⌞ 089Q — Custom Flyout & Popup (quiz)

03 — Patterns

Reusable architectural and design patterns.

Pattern Covered In
MVVM with DI (Microsoft.Extensions.DI) 032
App lifetimes & startup patterns 037
Service locator vs DI Pattern 001
Modular app with plugin-style views Pattern 002
Async initialization patterns Pattern 003
State management (Flux / singleton / IMessenger) Pattern 004
Repository / Unit of Work Pattern 005
Logging patterns Pattern 006
Editor application architecture Pattern 007
Toggle & state management Pattern 008
Focus & keyboard navigation Pattern 008b
Lazy load / virtual scrolling Pattern 009
Storage & file I/O pipeline Pattern 009b

04 — Migration

Moving between versions and platforms.

Guide Status
Avalonia 11 → 12 Migration Complete — 10-phase guide
WPF → Avalonia Key Mappings Complete — control/property/binding/style tables
Key breaking changes in 12.0.4 See Q01 quick-ref

05 — Avalonia Plus

Coverage of the commercial tool suite.

Tool Status
DevTools — setup & usage guide Complete
Parcel — packaging walkthrough Complete

Reference Material

  • Avalonia Official Docs (12.x)
  • Plugin: Development Plugin for Avalonia (external — 69 specialized reference docs available in the plugin repo)

Viewing the Docs

Open viewer.html in this directory via a local HTTP server:

# Quick start (auto-detects available tool):
.\serve-docs.ps1

# Or manually with Python:
python -m http.server 8080
# then open http://localhost:8080/viewer.html

# Or with .NET (install once):
dotnet tool install -g dotnet-serve
dotnet serve --directory . --port 8080

The viewer provides styled rendering, a table of contents sidebar, syntax-highlighted code blocks, dark mode (system preference), and a dropdown to navigate between all documents.

Quiz Layer

Each tutorial has a companion quiz (e.g., 001Q — Project Setup (quiz)) under the same number prefix. Quizzes use ````quizfenced code blocks rendered as interactive graded widgets byviewer.html`. See quiz-creation-skill for format rules and the quiz template for a blank starter.

Behind the Scenes

Resource Purpose
_skills/quiz-creation-skill.md Quiz format, workflow, implementation reference
_skills/verbose-creation-skill.md Verbose companion creation workflow
_skills/audit-skill.md Post-creation audit checks
_skills/documentation-skill.md Base tone and style rules
_skills/research-skill.md API and version research
_assets/templates/quiz-template.md Blank quiz file
_assets/templates/tutorial-template.md Blank tutorial file
_assets/templates/example-template.md Blank example file
link-audit.ps1 Cross-reference link validation script

Found an issue? Open a discussion.
